description: Agent-native Cloudflare Registrar CLI for domain search, live pricing checks, and gated registration.

novel_features.name: Cloudflare cf OAuth reuse
novel_features.description: Reuses existing Cloudflare cf OAuth token and account context when explicit env vars are absent, without printing secrets.

novel_features.name: Registrar purchase confirmation gate
novel_features.description: Blocks live registration unless confirm-domain exactly matches domain-name after a fresh price check.

novel_features.name: Agent-safe live domain pricing
novel_features.description: Uses Cloudflare Registrar live check endpoint with the correct domains[] wire shape for final availability and pricing.
